description: Lien Processing — manages lien filings, releases, and ELT (Electronic Lien and Title) transactions for vehicle titles

hard_stops.label: Lienholder Not ELT Registered
hard_stops.logic: Lienholder is not registered with the state Electronic Lien and Title system — cannot process electronic lien filing

hard_stops.label: Release by Non-Lienholder
hard_stops.logic: Lien release request submitted by a party that is not the recorded lienholder — release is invalid

hard_stops.label: Duplicate Lien Filing
hard_stops.logic: An active lien by the same lienholder already exists on this title — cannot file duplicate lien

soft_flags.label: Multiple Liens on Title
soft_flags.logic: Vehicle title already has two or more active liens — verify lien priority order
